verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Great is the Lord God almighty Great is the Lord on high The train of His robe Fills the temple And we cry out Highest praise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Glory to the risen king Glory to the Son Glorious Son

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lift up your hands Open the doors Let the king Of glory come in And forever be our God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Holy is the Lord God almighty Holy is the Lord on high Let all the earth Bow before you And crown You Lord of all
